description: Create a requirements document at /home/ga/Documents/Q4_Requirements.txt containing the text: '1. 50x Enterprise Laptops, 2. 50x Desktop Monitors'. In SuiteCRM, create an Account named 'Global Tech Industries' and archive an external email from 'jane.doe@globaltech.com' to 'support@ourcompany.com' with the subject 'URGENT: Q4 Procurement Requirements'. The email body should state: 'Attached are our requirements for the Q4 hardware refresh. Please review and advise on lead times.' Ensure the archived email is related to the 'Global Tech Industries' Account and includes the 'Q4_Requirements.txt' file as an attachment.
